mapper.sql: ABR_SN AS reportSn, RSK_EVT_SN AS riskEventSn, RPRT_USR_SN AS reporterUserSn, RPTD_USR_SN AS reportedUserSn, ABR_TYPE_CD AS reportTypeCode, ABR_STATUS_CD AS statusCode, ABR_CN AS content, ABR_REF_TYPE_CD AS referenceTypeCode, ABR_REF_SN AS referenceSn, ABR_PROC_RSN_CN AS processReason, ABR_REG_DT AS registeredAt, CASE WHEN ABR_STATUS_CD IN ('ABRC0007', 'ABRC0008') THEN ABR_UPDT_DT ELSE NULL END AS processedAt
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ABUSE_REPORT ( RSK_EVT_SN, RPRT_USR_SN, RPTD_USR_SN, ABR_TYPE_CD, ABR_STATUS_CD, ABR_REF_TYPE_CD, ABR_REF_SN, ABR_CN, ABR_REG_ID, ABR_UPDT_ID ) VALUES ( #{riskEventSn}, #{reporterUserSn}, #{reportedUserSn}, #{reportTypeCode}, #{statusCode}, #{referenceTypeCode}, #{referenceSn}, #{content}, #{registeredBy}, #{updatedBy} )
mapper.select: SELECT ABR_SN FROM ABUSE_REPORT WHERE RSK_EVT_SN = #{riskEventSn} FOR UPDATE

SELECT ABR_SN AS reportSn, RSK_EVT_SN AS riskEventSn, RPRT_USR_SN AS reporterUserSn, RPTD_USR_SN AS reportedUserSn, ABR_TYPE_CD AS reportTypeCode, ABR_STATUS_CD AS statusCode, ABR_REF_TYPE_CD AS referenceTypeCode, ABR_REF_SN AS referenceSn, ABR_CN AS content, ABR_PROC_RSN_CN AS processReason, ABR_REG_ID AS registeredBy, ABR_UPDT_ID AS updatedBy FROM ABUSE_REPORT WHERE ABR_SN = #{reportSn} FOR UPDATE

SELECT
FROM ABUSE_REPORT WHERE ABR_STATUS_CD IN (#{receivedStatusCode}, #{processingStatusCode}) ORDER BY ABR_REG_DT ASC, ABR_SN ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE ABUSE_REPORT SET ABR_STATUS_CD = #{newStatusCode}, ABR_PROC_RSN_CN = #{processReason}, ABR_UPDT_ID = #{actorId}, ABR_UPDT_DT = NOW() WHERE ABR_SN = #{reportSn} AND ABR_STATUS_CD = #{expectedStatusCode}
